title: CIVID Verified Leaders (Confirmed / Reported Deaths)
description: Separate leaders table for Hamas and other conflict organizations. Stores all verified leaders/senior figures reported as killed, confirmed dead, or officially acknowledged by reliable sources. Must NOT be merged into general casualty tables. Leaders reported by one source but not yet confirmed by another are included with verification_status='unverified' and needs_review=true (review queue). Politically sensitive records are NOT excluded. Only deaths supported by a reliable source are included; named-person data is never fabricated.

organization.description: Hamas, IRGC, RSF, Iranian Armed Forces, etc.

death_status.description: How the death is characterized by sources.

bio.description: Short verified bio; only facts stated by sources.

verified_by.description: Pipe-separated list of authoritative sources independently corroborating the death.

needs_review.description: true when reported by a single source / unconfirmed -> review queue.

event_id.description: Link to the corresponding event row if one exists.
